title: Florida woman sues Hershey for $5M over ‘misleading' Reese's packaging that ‘trick' customers
text: Cynthia Kelly, of Tampa, is suing The Hershey Company for $5 million for "tricking" customers with "misleading" packaging on Reese's that shows eyes and nose cutouts not seen on the actual candy.

title: Choc horror: Hershey hit with $5m lawsuit over 'misleading' Halloween sweets
text: Chocolate giant Hershey is being sued by a disgruntled customer who said its Halloween-themed peanut butter treats didn't match the packaging.

title: Hershey is sued over lack of artistic detail on Reese's candies
text: Hershey has been sued by a Florida woman who said its holiday-themed Reese's peanut butter candies lack the artistic details shown on the packaging that make them worth buying.

title: Hershey (HSY) on Track With Pricing Actions Amid Higher Costs
text: Hershey (HSY) is undertaking strategic pricing initiatives to counter a rising cost environment. The company regularly brings innovation to its core brands to meet consumer demand.

title: The Hershey Company: A Sweet Dividend Growth Stock Anticipating 2024 Deflation
text: A premium U.S. brand name consumer staple, trading well off its highs to the tune of 35%. Hershey is undervalued when considering the consistently high 10-year dividend CAGR. A deflationary environment and a rotation to small, mid and large caps away from mega caps could make staples a target for funds in 2024.

title: 4 beaten-down consumer giants analysts say have upside

title: 3 Stocks Feeling the Weight of the Ozempic Effect
text: The new class of weight loss drugs such as Ozempic and Zepbound are having a profound impact not only on the pharmaceutical and healthcare industries but also on areas of the economy ranging from gyms and weight loss clubs to fast food restaurants and clothing retailers. Earlier this year, the nutrition and weight management company Jenny Craig filed for bankruptcy after 40 years as a going concern, citing a decline in sales and membership that it largely blamed on the new class of weight loss drugs.

title: 3 of the Most Attractive Dividend Stocks in the Consumer Staples Space
text: Consumer staples have been a defensive sector, especially during market downturns. Historically, they have outperformed the market during bear markets.

title: 94% of Hershey's Profit Comes From Candy. But the Future Success of Its Business Is Riding on Something Else Entirely.
text: Hershey's strategy changed -- for the better -- when its current CEO took over in 2017. Moving beyond candy has provided the company with some of its best growth in years.

title: Hershey: Sector Rotation Could Lead To Significant Upside In 2024
text: The Hershey Company is a strong candidate for investment as it is growing its top and bottom line, buying back shares, and providing dividend growth to shareholders. Hershey's brand awareness is high, and its products are widely available, making it a potential beneficiary of a sector rotation when the Fed pivots. Hershey's financials, valuation, and dividend program make it an attractive investment option, especially compared to other consumer staples brands like Coca-Cola and PepsiCo.

title: What Charlie Munger and Grandma Ruth taught this money manager. His portfolio is up 50% this year.
text: At the start of 2023 and following a tough year, Christopher Tsai, president and chief investment officer of Tsai Capital, didn't think technology would generate a 50% return for his $110 million portfolio.

title: 5 Relatively Secure And Cheap Dividend Stocks To Invest In - December 2023
text: This article is part of our monthly series where we highlight five large-cap, relatively safe, dividend-paying companies offering large discounts to their historical norms. We go over our filtering process to select just five conservative DGI stocks from more than 7,500 companies that are traded on U.S. exchanges, including OTC networks. In addition to the primary list that yields just over 3%, we present two other groups of five DGI stocks each, with the goal of moderate to high yields.
